name: spark-core
description: End-to-end ML automation workflow for Claude Code. Includes 10 specialized agents with shared report bus, reflection gates, MLOps registry layer, iterative self-check loops, pre-stage reflection planning, lessons learned system, parallel execution groups, traceability audit log, business plausibility checks, analytical methodology document generation, database connectors (Snowflake/PostgreSQL/BigQuery), feedback collection, reusable ML utilities, hooks for quality gates, and a built-in evaluation framework.
